description: §16.6 clean neg — filling a parametric snippet prop with the required lambda form SHALL NOT fire E-COMPONENT-034.
rationale: §16.6 fires the parametric-snippet error only when a caller uses `slot=` (the zero-parameter desugaring) on a parametric snippet prop. `<TabStrip row={ (item) => ... } />` supplies the lambda form the grammar requires for `snippet(item: string)`.
